script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== which graph-token scripts exist on the VM ==='
ls -la /home/azureuser/*graph*token*.sh 2>/dev/null
ls -la /home/azureuser/*token*.sh 2>/dev/null | head -10
echo '=== try mso-graph-token.sh first ==='
TOK=$(/home/azureuser/mso-graph-token.sh 2>/dev/null)
echo "mso token length: ${#TOK}"
if [ ${#TOK} -lt 100 ]; then
  echo 'mso-graph-token.sh failed or short. Trying yoomd-graph-refresh-token from keyvault...'
  TOK=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name yoomd-graph-refresh-token --query value -o tsv 2>/dev/null)
  echo "yoomd refresh token length: ${#TOK}"
fi
echo '=== search Teams catalog for Kaye-related apps (displayName + bot endpoint patterns) ==='
for pattern in 'Kaye' 'kayeai' 'Elamparo'; do
  echo "--- $pattern ---"
  curl -sS -G "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps" \
    --data-urlencode "\$filter=contains(displayName,'${pattern}')" \
    --data-urlencode '$select=id,displayName,distributionMethod,externalId' \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOK" 2>&1 | python3 -c 'import json,sys
try:
  d=json.load(sys.stdin)
  if d.get("error"):
    print("ERROR:", d["error"].get("code"), d["error"].get("message","")[:200])
  else:
    apps=d.get("value",[])
    print(f"  matches: {len(apps)}")
    for a in apps:
      print("   -", a.get("displayName"), "|", a.get("distributionMethod"), "| id=", a.get("id"))
except Exception as e:
  print("parse-err:", e, file=sys.stderr)' 2>&1
done
echo '=== Azure Bot Service - is OpenClaw-KayeAgent registered? ==='
az bot show -g SDNeurosurgery-OpenClaw -n OpenClaw-KayeAgent --query '{name:name,endpoint:properties.endpoint,enabled:properties.isStreamingSupported}' -o json 2>&1 | head -20
echo '===END==='
